name: sendjob-intake
_NOTES: WIRING NOTE (E02S01): The Webhook node has TWO outputs in responseNode mode.
Output 0 (top) → Respond to Webhook (fires 200 OK immediately to Twilio)
Output 1 (bottom) → Parse SMS Fields (downstream processing continues async)
This ensures Twilio gets 200 OK within 15 seconds regardless of downstream duration.
1. Verify Webhook node path = 'sendjob-intake' and method = POST
2. Verify Respond to Webhook has responseCode = 200
3. Copy the Production URL from the Webhook node
4. Paste that URL into Twilio Console > Phone Numbers > +13212489804 > Messaging > Webhook
5. Set HTTP method = POST in Twilio
6. Activate the workflow (toggle at top right)
